scripts.lint:syntax: node -e "const{readdirSync,statSync}=require('fs');const p=require('path');const{spawnSync}=require('child_process');const w=(d)=>{for(const f of readdirSync(d)){const a=p.join(d,f);if(statSync(a).isDirectory())w(a);else if(a.endsWith('.mjs')){const r=spawnSync(process.execPath,['--check',a],{stdio:'inherit'});if(r.status!==0)process.exit(r.status)}}};w('lib');w('routes')"
